## 20:36 — Heartbeat 20:36 resumed after EAGAIN/gateway restart

Heartbeat run at 20:36 AEST was interrupted by system resource pressure: multiple exec calls returned `spawn /bin/zsh EAGAIN` and `fork failed: resource temporarily unavailable`. Gateway restarted automatically; heartbeat resumed from existing transcript.

Re-read state after restart:
- `heartbeat-state.json`: updated to 20:36; all core checks ok except two stale/real alerts.
- `cost-state.json`: weekly request budget 2434/59366 (4.1%) — unchanged from 20:20.
